name: grimoire
description: Grimoire — the AI-native consulting workspace for the Rattle product configurator and technical-documentation system (rattleapp.de). Bundles 13 skills (configurator, api, pricelist-analysis, suggest-config, document-templates, techdoc, safety-notices, ghs-statements, techdoc-language, apply-config, audit, tenant-memory, bom-builder), 6 subagents, 7 slash commands, JSON Schemas for every output contract, and golden I/O examples. Encodes the #1 configurator rule (explicit options for ALL variants), 12 configuration rules, 4 anti-patterns, 6 configurator structural checks, 7 idempotent ensure_* operation types, the variant-BOM definition layer (usage_subclauses DSL with AND/OR clause folding, three option_scalings shapes, numbered-option scaling patterns, alt_group + priority alternates, ghost depth-transparency, BOM explosion semantics), the 15-chapter normative technical-documentation structure (DIN EN ISO 20607, IEC/IEEE 82079-1, MRL 2006/42/EG, MVO (EU) 2023/1230), 12 technical-documentation audit checks, the EditorJS safety_notice + hp_statement block contracts, 31-locale signal-word catalogue, 24-locale CLP H/P/EUH statement catalogue, the 6 ISO 7010 + 9 GHS pictogram catalogues, and the IEC/IEEE 82079-1 §7 quality criteria — so any AI model can produce, audit, and apply correct, CE-compliant Rattle configurations and technical documentations.
